name: fortnox_aggregate_reporting

trigger.description: 05:00 on the 2nd of every month, Europe/Stockholm.

description: Pulls aggregated finance data from Fortnox (bucketed by funding_tag). No personal data or invoice-level detail is fetched.

steps.notes: Call Fortnox with filters that return bucketed totals only. Never request line-item or customer data.
Reject any response containing a blocked field (e.g. a customer name).
POST to reporting-service /reports/monthly with activities (from activity-service) + finance from Fortnox.
